title: MSW Compat
description: Spell Power x Marium's Soulslike Weaponry
body:
This mod adds Spell Power scaling to some weapons while other weapons have improved scaling based on their attack damage, attack speed, etc.. and they're fully configurable as well inside ```msw-compat.json```!

This mod / addon is made for the fantastic mod called [Marium's Soulslike Weaponry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mariums-soulslike-weaponry), be sure to support them!

These are the supported weapons (might be missing some in the pictures, look at configs for all supported weapons)

If ```useKevslibraryPetInheritanceAttribute``` is true, you'll need kevslibrary for the mod to add the attribute!

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_46bf02ea-c2cc-4b9f-90f0-1abe58d72137.png)

Some weapons will have extra attributes like:

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_f38fb647-3a84-49ce-8f15-5731ec29e937.png)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_badc7155-4eac-4158-a010-ab31f1137b9e.png)
[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PixelDreamStudios/SPEC_PixelDreamStudios_Promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)
